inline_comments.message: you can replace "len(metadata)!=0" with simple "metadata", empty list evaluates to False not empty to True

I wonder if it is good to limit metadata to just one argument? 
perhaps action='append'. so it could be used multiple times. 
OR
more user friendly: make it a an infinite list (nargs="+")and allow format key=value (or key:value). So it would look like --add-metadata owner=Ondrej project=onap day=monday. So you get is as a list and right away change into dictionary before even leaving run_cli. then you just append it to build info.
